channel.title: Mikhail Stock Library
channel.description: Commercial images for technology, business, industry, healthcare and modern visual communication.

item.title: Construction engineer using futuristic digital interface for project management at night
item.description: Construction engineer using futuristic digital interface for project management at night. Subjects: engineer, construction, technology, digital, interface, hologram, future, management, project, planning, architecture, datum. License this image on Adobe Stock.
